items.name_cn:
【LanD Embroidery Mixed Leather New Size】
Dior Mini Book tote
A retro yet stylish statement piece ♡ The exquisite embroidery craftsmanship is perfectly presented, adding a highlight to your outfit with just a casual carry~ This mini bag is so adorable! The small size is also very convenient for holding small items~ Who wears it becomes stylish, a must-have for pretty girls who love high aesthetics.
Style No.: 1265/1286
Size: 26.5×21×14cm
Fits an iPad Air 4 or an iPad Pro 11

items.name_cn:
【LanD Embroidery Mixed Leather❤ Large】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote bag is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. It can hold various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" logo, fully reflecting Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style No.: 1286
Size: 42×35×18.5cm

items.name_en: 【lv charms card holder】 m12215 Monogram Red m12227 Monogram Blue (Silk-screened - Christmas)
items.name_cn:
【lv charms card holder】 m12215 Monogram Red m12227 Monogram Blue (Silk-screened - Christmas)
This LV charms card holder is from the Candy Factory series, inviting the brand mascot to enjoy a wonderful holiday season. Monogram canvas depicts Vivienne wandering amidst colorful candies, with Vivienne styling and LV floral details.
Size: 7.3 x 0.3 x 10.2 cm

items.name_cn:
【LV Premium Full Steel - Changeable Chip Version - Full Packaging Set】
【Item No.】M13014 CarryAll BB
【Description】This CarryAll BB handbag features Monogram canvas, accented with a dazzling chain and Monogram flowers, lighting up day and night occasions in a trendy style. The leather nameplate complements the tie closure, and the zippered interior pocket makes it easy to access credit cards daily.
-Monogram coated canvas, calfskin trim, fabric lining, metal hardware, tie and magnetic snap closure, zippered interior pocket, nameplate
【Size】17 x 10 x 26 cm (Height x Width x Length)

items.name_en: 【LV x TM ALL IN BB Bag】M13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【LV x TM ALL IN BB Bag】M13089 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This All In BB GxHlSJ bag conveys the playful style of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series through dynamic details. The Monogram coated canvas presents the artist's colorful rainbow tones, and the nameplate features a bow and lock decoration. The adjustable calfskin handle and leather shoulder strap allow for hand-carry, shoulder carry, or crossbody wear.
Size: 18 x 12 x 16 cm.

items.name_en: 【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
items.name_cn:
【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 SjGx handbag features a classic Monogram pattern rendered in bright colors by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, while the dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

specs.rawTitle:
【LV X TM SPEEDY BANDOULIÈRE 25 Handbag】 M13085
This Speedy Bandoulière 25 SjGx handbag features a classic Monogram pattern rendered in bright colors by Japanese artist Takashi Murakami, showcasing the dynamic charm of the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series together with the bow-shaped key pouch. Calfskin creates the Toron handle and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, while the dazzling lock and corners draw inspiration from the brand's luggage elements.
Size: 25 x 19 x 15 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 【LV x TM VANITY CHAIN POUCH Bag】M13662 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
items.name_cn:
【LV x TM VANITY CHAIN POUCH Bag】M13662 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Vanity Pouch SjCc bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series, reinterpreting the brand's classic Monogram pattern with the artist's vivid tones. The coated canvas features calfskin trim, a zip closure, a detachable chain, and a LV-engraved lock for added metallic shine.
Size: 11.5 x 6.5 x 19 cm

items.name_cn:
【M47072】Backup Black Backpack
Top-tier
This Backup Ys backpack is crafted from Monogram Empreinte calfskin leather, subtly featuring Monogram embossing. The detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allows for both single-shoulder and backpack carrying, while the top handle and braided chain offer tote or crossbody options.
Dimensions: 20 x 22 x 14 cm (Length x Height x Width)
